name: TokenMix
description: Registers TokenMix as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream chat and embedding model discovery.

env.description: Fallback TokenMix API key used for discovery, inference, and embeddings when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: TokenMix API key
settings.description: TokenMix API key used for model discovery, inference, and embeddings. Falls back to TOKENMIX_API_KEY.

providers.name: TokenMix
providers.description: Refreshes TokenMix chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.

providers.name: TokenMix Embeddings
providers.description: Refreshes TokenMix embedding models and embeds text through TokenMix's embeddings API.
